name: Characters & Settings Phase - Individual File Creation
description: Tests that characters and settings are created individually using generate_content. Each character/setting gets its own file automatically.
systemPrompt: You are a video generation orchestrator. You must process characters and settings ONE AT A TIME using generate_content. Each character and setting is saved to its own file automatically.

tools.name: generate_content
tools.description: Generate creative content with automatic context injection and file saving

name.description: Name of the character or setting

tools.name: TodoWrite
tools.description: Create or update the todo list

merge.description: Whether to merge with existing todos

cases.name: Should create individual character using generate_content with name

context.phase_instructions: Create detailed character profile for Kira. Use generate_content(content_type: "character", name: "Kira"). Process ONE character at a time.

cases.name: Should create individual setting using generate_content with name

context.phase_instructions: Create detailed setting description for the Ancient Forest. Use generate_content(content_type: "setting", name: "Ancient Forest"). Process ONE setting at a time.

cases.name: Should use generate_content for character (not bundled file)

context.phase_instructions: Create character profile for Daniel. Use generate_content - it automatically saves to individual file characters/daniel.md.

cases.name: Should use generate_content for setting (not bundled file)

context.phase_instructions: Create setting description for the Train Station. Use generate_content - it automatically saves to individual file settings/train_station.md.

cases.name: generate_content should be for single character, not multiple

context.phase_instructions: Create detailed character profile for Sarah. Use generate_content(content_type: "character", name: "Sarah"). This is one character only.

cases.name: Should create TodoWrite with individual items before processing

context.phase_instructions: Story has characters: Alice, Bob, Charlie. Create a todo for each character, then process them one at a time. Start by creating the TodoWrite.

cases.name: Should use generate_content with character name (context auto-injected)

context.phase_instructions: Create character profile for Elena. Use generate_content(content_type: "character", name: "Elena"). Context is automatically injected.

cases.name: Should use generate_content with setting name (context auto-injected)

context.phase_instructions: Create setting description for the Castle. Use generate_content(content_type: "setting", name: "Castle"). Context is automatically injected.
